Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc

Class AttributeDesc

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc.ItemDesc
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc.AttributeDesc
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAttributeDesc
Direct Known Subclasses:
ComboDesc, NullAttributeDesc, TextDesc, ToggleDesc
public abstract class AttributeDesc extends ItemDesc implements IAttributeDesc

    abstract IEditComposite
    createWidget()
     
    IAttributeType
    getAttributeType()
    Returns the attributeType corresponding to this description.
    IAttributeManipulation
    getManipulation()
    Returns the manipulation associated to the attribute.
    String
    getSuffix()
    Returns the suffix that should be displayed after the attribute.
    boolean
    isChoiceAttribute()
    Tells if the attribute is displayed as a choice in a list, that is was contributed as a choiceAttribute to the editorItems extension point.
    boolean
    isHorizontalExpand()
    This indicates that the editing area should expand horizontally.
    boolean
    isMath()
    Tells whether mathematical symbols from the attribute value should be translated.
    boolean
    isMultiLine()
    Tells if the attribute is displayed as text on several lines.
    boolean
    isTextAttribute()
    Tells if the attribute is displayed as text, that is was contributed as a textAttribute to the editorItems extension point.
    boolean
    isToggleAttribute()
    Tells if the attribute is displayed as a toggle, that is was contributed as a toggleAttribute to the editorItems extension point.
    String
    toString()

  • Method Details

    • getSuffix

      public String getSuffix()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Returns the suffix that should be displayed after the attribute.
      Specified by:
      getSuffix in interface IAttributeDesc
      Returns:
      the string corresponding to the suffix to display after the attribute value

    • createWidget

      public abstract IEditComposite createWidget()

    • isHorizontalExpand

      public boolean isHorizontalExpand()
      This indicates that the editing area should expand horizontally.
      Specified by:
      isHorizontalExpand in interface IAttributeDesc
      Returns:
      true if the attribute edition zone shall expand horizontally, false otherwise

    • getManipulation

      public IAttributeManipulation getManipulation()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Returns the manipulation associated to the attribute.
      Specified by:
      getManipulation in interface IAttributeDesc
      Returns:
      the attribute manipulation for the concerned attribute

    • getAttributeType

      public IAttributeType getAttributeType()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Returns the attributeType corresponding to this description.
      Specified by:
      getAttributeType in interface IAttributeDesc
      Returns:
      the attribute type which this description concerns

    • isChoiceAttribute

      public boolean isChoiceAttribute()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Tells if the attribute is displayed as a choice in a list, that is was contributed as a choiceAttribute to the editorItems extension point.
      Specified by:
      isChoiceAttribute in interface IAttributeDesc
      Returns:
      true if the attribute is a choice attribute, false otherwise

    • isToggleAttribute

      public boolean isToggleAttribute()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Tells if the attribute is displayed as a toggle, that is was contributed as a toggleAttribute to the editorItems extension point.
      Specified by:
      isToggleAttribute in interface IAttributeDesc
      Returns:
      true if the attribute is a toggle attribute, false otherwise

    • isTextAttribute

      public boolean isTextAttribute()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Tells if the attribute is displayed as text, that is was contributed as a textAttribute to the editorItems extension point.
      Specified by:
      isTextAttribute in interface IAttributeDesc
      Returns:
      true if the attribute is a text attribute, false otherwise

    • isMultiLine

      public boolean isMultiLine()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Tells if the attribute is displayed as text on several lines. This means that the attribute is a text attribute and that the style attribute was set to multi.
      Specified by:
      isMultiLine in interface IAttributeDesc
      Returns:
      true if the attribute is a text attribute displayed on several lines, false otherwise
      See Also:
      • IAttributeDesc.isTextAttribute()

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • isMath

      public boolean isMath()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Tells whether mathematical symbols from the attribute value should be translated. Returns false if the attribute in not a text attribute.
      Specified by:
      isMath in interface IAttributeDesc
      Returns:
      true if the mathematical symbols contained by the text attribute value should be translated, false otherwise
